summary: Coach Action Bar Feature Testing Complete - NEW floating action bar replacing QuickActionsBar. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 modals work correctly. One minor UX issue: toggle close behavior not working.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay (z-60) covers action bar (z-50), blocking toggle clicks. Also overlay div lacks onClick={onCancel}. ROOT CAUSE: z-index layering prevents toggle, and overlay doesn't have click-to-close.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Either: (1) Add onClick={onCancel} to overlay divs in all modal components, OR (2) Increase action bar z-index to z-[70]

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - causes hydration error (appears to be VE tooling injection, not functional issue)

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix modal close/toggle behavior - add onClick={onCancel} to overlay divs in CoachEmailComposer, CoachLogInteraction, CoachFollowUpScheduler, EscalateToDirector (line 37/50/49/60 respectively) to allow clicking outside modal to close
critical_code_review_comments: CoachEmailComposer.js line 58: Dynamic content inside <option> may cause React hydration warnings - consider simplifying option content

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all modals work, toggle close behavior minor issue)

seed_data_creation: Test notes created and cleaned up during backend API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Action Bar feature fully tested. Key data-testid selectors: coach-action-bar, cab-email, cab-log, cab-followup, cab-notes, cab-escalate, coach-email-composer, coach-email-to/subject/body/send, coach-log-form, coach-log-type/outcome/date/notes/save, coach-followup-form, coach-followup-date/type/notes/save, pod-notes-panel/textarea/save/list, escalate-form, escalate-reason/urgency-low/urgency-medium/urgency-high/details/submit. Old QuickActionsBar [data-testid='quick-actions-bar'] is correctly NOT rendered.

test_classes: TestNotesEndpoint - CREATE notes with Email/Interaction/Follow-up/Coach Note/Escalation tags, GET notes list, PATCH update note, DELETE note
TestPodActionsEndpoint - CREATE action for follow-up feature
TestEscalateEndpoint - POST escalation with high/medium/low urgency
TestSupportPodResponse - Verify pod data structure for action bar
TestCleanup - Clean up TEST_ prefixed data

floating_action_bar.details: Fixed position at bottom center (position: fixed, bottom: 20px), all 5 buttons present (Email, Log, Follow-up, Notes, Escalate)

email_modal.fields: To dropdown (athlete + pod members), Subject input, Message textarea, Log Email button

log_interaction_modal.fields: Type dropdown (8 options: Athlete Check-in, Parent Call, Event Prep Conversation, Pod Discussion, Director Update, Video Call, In-Person Meeting, Other), Outcome dropdown (4 options: Positive, Neutral, Needs Follow-up, Concern Raised), Date input, Notes textarea

followup_modal.fields: Date picker (native HTML date input), Type dropdown (7 options), Notes input (optional), Set Reminder button

notes_sidebar.animation: Slide-in from right (translate-x animation), transform: matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0) when open
notes_sidebar.fields: Textarea for new note, Save Note button, Notes list with edit/delete per note

escalate_modal.fields: Reason dropdown (6 options), Urgency toggles (Low/Medium/High buttons), Details textarea, Escalate button
escalate_modal.theme: Dark (#161b25 background), AMBER accents (border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2))

toggle_behavior.details: Clicking same button again does NOT close modal - should toggle

api_verification.POST_athletes_notes: 200 OK - creates notes with various tags
